content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

`git diff` on the worktree was empty, so I reviewed the current committed milestone-lineage implementation in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs`, and `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` plus the related tests. I did not find any actionable correctness, safety, or robustness issues. `cargo test milestone_record:: -- --nocapture` passed.

## Amendments

None.
